column9: UKZN uses the standard NSC 7-point scale PLUS an 8th point for 90-100%. LO is NOT included in the APS (0 points allocated). APS = best 6 subjects excluding LO. Maximum possible APS = 48. Meeting minimum APS does not guarantee a place — selection is by academic ranking from 48 downward until places are filled.
